# Copilot Instructions

This project uses my-agent-kit. Copilot automatically reads:
- `CLAUDE.md` — project instructions (via `chat.useClaudeMdFile`)
- `.claude/rules/` — workflow and development rules
- `.claude/skills/` — 80+ domain knowledge packs (SKILL.md format)

No need to duplicate those here. This file is for Copilot-specific additions only.

## Copilot-Specific Notes

- Use conventional commits: `feat:`, `fix:`, `refactor:`, `test:`
- Plans go in `./plans/` with timestamp naming
- Read `./README.md` first for project context
- Read `./docs/code-standards.md` for code standards
